onb_sub_sectors: Select sectors to personalize your dashboard.
onb_sub_scale: This helps us prioritize projects for your capital capacity.
home_subtitle: Ask anything about investment in Indonesia.
home_ai_suffix: , I've identified key strategic projects. New Tax Holiday incentives are available for large-scale investments in this sector.
mock_p1_desc: Strategic processing facility to increase value-added palm oil exports.
mock_p2_desc: Modern fish canning and cold chain hub for the eastern region.
mock_p3_desc: Integrated hospitality and MICE infrastructure serving the Borobudur heritage corridor.
proj_dummy_desc: A unified generative AI system to resolve information silos via semantic search and intelligent matching, uniting 81 Priority Investment Projects.
proj_dummy_p1: The Investika (PIR) portal currently faces language and information barriers for international investors, with investment data scattered across 6 different silos (Opportunities, Downstream, Regional, Policy, Incentives, and Studies). This project proposes building a unified AI layer that transforms the BKPM portal into an Interactive Investment Assistant.
proj_dummy_p2: Through Agentic AI technology, this platform provides a real-time multilingual bridge (English, Mandarin, Japanese) and a proactive matching engine that automatically aligns investor risk profiles with a national project pipeline worth IDR 239 Trillion.
proj_inn1_desc: Automated translation & summarization for 81 Priority Projects and Pre-FS Studies into major foreign languages.
proj_inn2_desc: Semantic Search-based recommendation system that aligns investor profiles with Downstream data.
proj_inn3_desc: Dynamic proximity visualization of road, port, and electricity infrastructure for 12 IKN Strategic Projects.
proj_inn4_desc: Secure access (Regulatory Sandbox) to feasibility documents with an audit log tracking investor access.
proj_imp1_desc: Direct access to executive summaries via natural language queries without downloading hundreds of PDFs.
proj_imp2_desc: Transforms static interactions into a concierge experience, driving measurable Letters of Intent (LoI).
proj_imp3_desc: Seamless integration between Regional DPMPTSP, Bappenas, and Technical Ministry databases.
login_hero_subtitle: Explore strategic projects, policy insights, and personalized investment support with VestiAI.
policy_subtitle: Comprehensive guide to Indonesia's investment laws, tax incentives, and compliance frameworks.
policy_1_desc: Up to 100% corporate income tax reduction for 5 to 20 years for pioneer industries with a minimum investment of IDR 500 Billion.
policy_2_desc: Ultimate facility combining tax holidays, custom exemptions, and ease of licensing for specific geographic zones.
policy_3_desc: Core regulations governing foreign capital, ownership limits, and legal protections under the Omnibus Law.

reg_ai_text_template: Sentiment in {region} is shifting toward Aggressive Infrastructure Growth. Recent approvals for industrial clusters suggest a high degree of government alignment with FDI goals.
comp_subtitle: AI-driven comparative analysis evaluating financial viability, regional risk profiles, and execution timelines across your short-listed opportunities.
submit_hub_desc: Preview how this opportunity may appear across investor-facing regional portals.

submit_success_desc: Your project has been submitted and translated into five languages. It is now under review.

proj_media_none: No media available for this project.

home_ai_search_error: I couldn't complete that AI search right now, so I'm still showing the current project list.
home_ai_results_count: I found {count} projects matching your query.
home_hint_ai: AI auto-filters projects based on your query.
wiki_subtitle: Quick definitions for project, finance, policy, and regional terminology used across Investika.
comp_ai_summary_1: Based on a multidimensional analysis of the selected opportunities, {project} emerges as the most balanced asset for core institutional allocation, driven by immediate off-taker demand and strong regional logistics integration.
comp_ai_summary_2: Overall, this portfolio offers superior execution certainty with a low-to-medium risk profile, primarily due to the G2G financing structures and sovereign guarantees embedded in these strategic assets.
wiki_term_ppi_short: Project profile or preliminary project information.
wiki_term_ppi_meaning: Used in Investika as a shorthand project-status style label for an early project information package, not yet a fully investment-ready opportunity.
wiki_term_ppi_why: If a project is still labeled PPI, the commercial package is likely thinner and an investor should expect more diligence questions.
wiki_term_ipro_meaning: A project packaged far enough for investor review, usually with clearer sponsor, location, and commercial details.
wiki_term_ipro_why: This typically signals a more mature opportunity than a basic profile and a better starting point for investor outreach.
wiki_term_capex_meaning: The upfront capital needed to build or launch the project, including land, machinery, construction, utilities, and setup costs.
wiki_term_capex_why: CAPEX shapes funding needs, financing structure, and the scale of investor commitment required at entry.
wiki_term_irr_short: Expected annual return rate of the project.
wiki_term_irr_meaning: Internal Rate of Return estimates the annualized percentage return a project is expected to generate over time.
wiki_term_irr_why: Investors use IRR as a fast benchmark for attractiveness when comparing multiple opportunities.
comp_empty_desc: Add up to three projects from the catalog, region pages, or project detail pages. The comparison table will then show commercial returns, readiness, governance, and land-side signals in one view.
